title: Refinement & Testing
description: Intensive community testing and refinement of the framework modules based on real-world implementation feedback from various scientific domains.

title: The WorldFAIR Project
description: Significant acceleration of CDIF development as part of the WorldFAIR project, resulting in the first structured drafts of the core profiles.

title: Laying the Foundation
description: Early conceptualization of the framework through pilot studies and cross-domain workshops involving multiple international data bodies.
